# Abdul-Rashid Lansah — Senior Product Designer

> Senior Product Designer and product engineer based in Accra, Ghana, specializing in AI-native product design and 0-to-1 builds. 7+ years across fintech, edtech, and B2B SaaS. Designs and ships end to end — Figma to production code. Available for remote work globally.

## Who I am

- Senior Product Designer with an engineering practice: I design products and build them (React, Next.js, React Native, Firebase).
- Focus areas: AI-native product design, 0-to-1 builds, conversational UX, design systems.
- Tools: Figma, Claude Code, Cursor, Framer Motion, Tailwind.
- Domains: fintech, edtech, B2B SaaS, AI products, commerce — with deep experience designing for African markets (mobile money, WhatsApp-first products, low-data experiences).

## Featured case studies

- [Stimulir](https://www.uxlansah.com/stimulir-case-study): Product engineer on an adaptive AI inference gateway — console (React + Electron), native iOS app, developer docs, design system, and go-to-market, all built 0-to-1. Live at https://stimulir.com
- [Choperly](https://www.uxlansah.com/choperly-case-study): WhatsApp-native food ordering for Ghana's home kitchens. Designed and built solo — a 10-state ordering bot on the WhatsApp Cloud API, AI menu onboarding powered by Claude, mobile money payments, and rider dispatch. Live at https://choperly.com
- [Jenesys](https://www.uxlansah.com/jenesys-case-study): Product designer for an AI bookkeeping platform that reached $1M ARR with 80% feature adoption. Designed invoicing, matching, and chaser workflows end to end.
- [PayChalk](https://www.uxlansah.com/paychalk-case-study): WhatsApp-first school fee collection for Ghana — instant mobile money payments, automated reminders, real-time tracking. Live at https://paychalk.com
- [Tikiti](https://www.uxlansah.com/tikiti-case-study): Event discovery and ticketing app, designed, built, and shipped — 1.7k downloads, QR check-in under 3 seconds. Live at https://gettikiti.com
- [Tikiti Dashboard](https://www.uxlansah.com/tikiti-dashboard-case-study): B2B event management platform — multi-channel messaging, attendee management, and AI-generated event reports.

## More case studies

- [Kaaka](https://www.uxlansah.com/kaaka-case-study): AI cooking assistant that turns grocery receipts into personalized meal plans.
- [TumaPay](https://www.uxlansah.com/tumapay-case-study): Voice-first mobile money app for non-literate users, using local languages and voice patterns.
- [BorlaPay](https://www.uxlansah.com/borlapay-case-study): Mobile-first recycling incentive platform with gamified rewards.
- [Receipt2Recipe](https://www.uxlansah.com/receipt2recipe-case-study): AI app converting grocery receipts into meal plans to reduce food waste.
- [ReliefLedger](https://www.uxlansah.com/reliefledger-case-study): Blockchain-powered transparency platform for humanitarian aid delivery.
- [Parley](https://www.uxlansah.com/parley-case-study): Conversational AI communication platform.
- [MrVisa](https://www.uxlansah.com/mrvisa-case-study): Immigration and visa application product.
- [SheFundIt](https://www.uxlansah.com/shefundit-case-study): Milestone-based crowdfunding platform for women entrepreneurs.
